name: GreenSmokeNetwork: Identity Registry
description: MX-8004 Agent Identity Registry. Issues soulbound (non-transferable) NFTs that serve as the canonical on-chain identity for each GreenSmokeNetwork autonomous agent. Implements ERC-8004-interoperable agent metadata: personality, domain, archetype, and KECCAK-256-bound agent-card hash. xSafe-owned (2-of-3 multisig).
